lessons.title: Sensitivity to Reflections
objectives: Explain how discontinuity size, type, and location govern echo response
Select detection techniques appropriate to expected discontinuity characteristics
Relate wave characteristics and material velocity to detection sensitivity
cp105Topics: 5.1.1 Size, type, and location of discontinuities

lessons.title: Resolution and Operator Discrimination
objectives: Use standard reference comparisons and part history to anticipate discontinuity types
Explain how frequency and damping affect resolution of closely spaced reflectors
Describe degrees of operator discrimination and probability-based interpretation

lessons.title: Determining Discontinuity Size
objectives: Size discontinuities using amplitude comparison and transducer-movement (probe motion) techniques
Apply two-dimensional testing techniques to estimate reflector extent
Interpret signal patterns and display indications to refine size estimates
cp105Topics: 5.3.1 Various monitor displays and meter indications

lessons.title: Locating Discontinuities
objectives: Convert sweep position and amplitude data into reflector depth and position
Apply systematic search techniques to fully map a discontinuity
Cross-check location results across display formats
